title: More Music Disk - Official NetherRP Datapack
description: Just add a few music disk to Minecraft
body:
This Datapack add a few music disc to the game!

Current musics:

- Env - Uprise
- Spooky Scary Skeleton
- Kain Vinosec - The Nothing Battles, Fight For Quiesence
- Kain Vinosec - The Nothing Battles, Endure Emptiness
- C418 - Stranger Things
- TheFatRat - Unity
- TheFatRat - Xenogenesis
- Galshi Revolution - Wolves
- Yvthé - Looking for something to search

If you have any suggestions, please tell us on our Discord or in the Github page!

Do you want to use this pack on your server but you already have another ressource pack? Merge your ressourcepacks with Mitochondria! Mitochondria: https://mito.thenuclearnexus.live/


If you found any issues, please report it on the github
